doc:
Converts a Hocuspocus / Tiptap Cloud webhook payload into clean HTML that you can store in your database.

When collaboration is active, the document lives on the collab server as a Y.js document. Webhooks deliver document changes as ProseMirror JSON — not HTML. This action takes that JSON and produces the same HTML the editor would output.

Accepts three input formats:
• Full Hocuspocus webhook body (auto-extracts the document)
• A document object with named fields (e.g. { "default": { "type": "doc", ... } })
• Raw ProseMirror JSON (e.g. { "type": "doc", "content": [...] })

field_name.caption: Field name
field_name.doc: The Y.js field name used by the collaboration document. Tiptap's default is "default". Custom Hocuspocus setups may use a different field name (e.g. "prosemirror"). Only relevant when the payload contains multiple document fields.
field_name.name: field_name

payload.caption: Payload (JSON)
payload.name: payload
